Description:
From Frederic Reinel, creator of Alone in the Dark®, 2Dark is a journey into darkness. Uncover the secrets of the madmen and save the children.

NEW STEALTH HORROR
- Avoid the harsh consequences of possible mistakes.
- Infiltrate 6 levels and get out with your children.
- Stay in the shadows. Light and sound can help. Or destroy it.
- Use supplies sparingly.
- Explore all corners, reveal secrets and find children.
- Children are children. Stay in one place and they will start spinning and crying, putting everyone in danger.
